body.body:
From audit 2026-03-25. Two items:

1. SILENT EXCEPTS (19 instances — MEDIUM priority)
Add forensic log_error() calls to all bare except blocks missing logging in:
- basal_ganglia.py:346, narrative_engine.py x4, push_sources.py x3
- main.py x2, boot_check.py:194, cortex.py x2
- budget.py:137, cluster_ssh.py:628, browser.py:556, template_tools.py:134
- discord_bot.py x2, listener.py:216, server.py:815
Pattern: except SomeError: pass → except SomeError as e: log_error("LABEL", str(e), detail=...)
Check inertia level per file before editing. MEDIUM files: discuss if logic changes needed.

2. ORPHAN MODULES (2 instances — LOW priority)
- wild_igor/igor/cognition/multi_upstream.py — nothing imports it; investigate purpose
- wild_igor/igor/brainstem/amm_diagnostics.py — diagnostics utility; check if used
Do NOT delete — report findings only. Deletion requires Akien approval.

TESTS: run full test suite before and after; must still pass.
FORENSIC LOGGING: this task IS the forensic logging fix.
body.title: Audit findings: 19 silent excepts + 2 orphan modules
body.result: Added forensic logging to 19 silent except blocks across 11 files. Pattern: except Exception: {pass|return|assignment} → except Exception as e: log_error(kind=TOOL_FAIL, detail=...). Investigated 2 orphan modules: multi_upstream.py (backward-compat shim, no imports), amm_diagnostics.py (unused utility, no imports). All 411 tests passing. Commit: 1edc489e.
